prop.name: grow
prop.help: flex_grow in a flex parent; NULL = natural size

prop.name: horizontal_align
prop.help: Children along the row: start, center, end, space_between, space_around, space_evenly

prop.name: vertical_align
prop.help: Children across the row: start, center, end

prop.name: content_align
prop.help: Placement of wrapped rows; only matters when children wrap
